qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Auth parameter bypass exposes credentials in URL allowing credential theft via logs and referrers
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable code and root cause: this finding concerns URL credential handling in webdav.php and remote.php, not Nextmatch col_filter SQL construction.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: SQL injection via ORDER BY parameter in calendar search allows data exfiltration
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different SQL injection source and sink: this finding targets calendar order-parameter concatenation in calendar_so, not the advisory's JSON numeric-key col_filter path in Nextmatch processing.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unsafe deserialization on file content permits remote code execution via object injection
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerability class and root cause: this finding concerns PHP unserialize/object injection paths, not SQL injection through Nextmatch col_filter filter processing.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: SQL injection in WebDAV Filesystem handler allows database compromise via PROPFIND path parameter
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different SQL injection entrypoint and vulnerable code: this finding targets WebDAV path interpolation in Filesystem.php, not Nextmatch col_filter handling in Api\Db or Api\Storage\Base.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause: authenticated Nextmatch col_filter SQL injection caused by JSON numeric keys becoming integer PHP array keys and bypassing is_int-based trust checks in Api\Storage\Base::parse_search and Api\Db::column_data_implode.
evidence: The advisory targets EGroupware Nextmatch filter processing through EGroupware\Api\Etemplate\Widget\Nextmatch::ajax_get_rows, col_filter, Api\Storage\Base::parse_search, and Api\Db::column_data_implode.

Targeted search of final reports and reproduction bundles found no references to Nextmatch, col_filter, parse_search, column_data_implode, ajax_get_rows, or the JSON numeric-key is_int bypass root cause.
The two qualifying SQL injection findings concern calendar ORDER BY concatenation and WebDAV path interpolation, which are different source-to-sink paths and vulnerable files.
The remaining qualifying findings concern PHP deserialization and URL credential disclosure, which do not share the advisory root cause.
